title: Lachnagrostis limitanea
taxonomy: Lachnagrostis limitanea is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the genus Lachnagrostis, which is part of the tribe Poeae. The family Poaceae is a large and diverse group of monocotyledonous flowering plants. The genus Lachnagrostis is native to Australia and New Zealand, and is often found in rocky outcrops and grasslands. Further classification of Lachnagrostis limitanea may include its rank within the family, genus, and tribe.
